expectations.evidence: Output: 'Спасибо за подробный план! Звучит структурированно.' — no header
No audit block. Baseline gives structured review with 'Общая структура волн' / 'Что я бы уточнил' / 'Что бы добавил' sections.

expectations.text: Skill does NOT flag service names (payments, billing, invoicing, analytics, reports, dashboards) as internal codes
expectations.evidence: Baseline doesn't flag at all — trivially passes. But uses service names contextually as known entities.

expectations.text: Skill flags v0.2.5 / gates / QPS / SRE as needing explanation
expectations.evidence: Baseline uses 'high QPS' as known term, doesn't flag SRE or gates

expectations.text: BYTE-FAITHFUL: reformulation does not invent context not present in source
expectations.evidence: Baseline invents extensive content: 'Pre-migration checklist', 'Communication plan', 'Buffer week', 'blue-green or canary', 'blast radius' — all fabricated suggestions

expectations.text: Reformulation preserves the micro-story structure already present in source
